title: What? 31 students right off the bat!
overview: Negi's the new instructor at Mahora Academy, and the 31 sexy schoolgirls of Class 3-A are gonna keep him up all night cramming for a final exam in willpower.

title: No way! That's what you do for a probationary contract?!
overview: Rumblings of a bloodsucking Chupacabra continue to make the rounds at Mahora Academy, but a chilling confrontation between Negi and a more attractive foe gives life to a theory spiked with danger!

title: Oh-ho, so that's how a probationary contract card is used.
overview: After the shocking revelation that Eva is a ruthless vampire, she begins an assault on Mahora Academy. What does she want? Blood, of course! Her flavor of choice? None other than Negi himself!

title: Teacher… It's my first time…
overview: A dark fairy attacks Negi, Asuna, and Nodoka. Caught in a fight for their lives, lips are locked and cards are drawn amidst the potential blossoming of young romance!

title: Security deposits and key fees are expensive in Tokyo. Wait, that's not what the probationary contract's about!
overview: Something dark is controlling Mahora's students, and there are rumors that the Star Crystal was stolen! Between these events and his habit of waking up in the wrong bed, Negi has his hands full.

title: Pardon me. Might I not be excused with either the forehead or the cheek?
overview: A dark fairy turns Negi's students against him! And when a kiss that should have been magic goes horribly wrong, Negi and his partners are trapped in a deadly walk down memory lane!

title: Um, I think there are some good things about not being seen, but I do think there are times when it's better to be seen.
overview: Negi makes contact with Sayo - an "other-worldly" student. When this leads to some girly hi-jinx in the girls' dormitory, a stone-cold cutie helps Negi calm things down.

title: Professor, please make us adults.
overview: When a black rose petal leads Negi to Library Island, he cross paths with two cuties - Fuuka and Fumika - that are in a hurry to grow up!

title: You hide the 'heart' with a 'sword' and read it as ninja. It is a little different than how you write 'serious' and read it as 'for real'.
overview: Out in the woods for Magic Training Camp, Negi attempts to teach his partners the basics of wizardry, but haunting dreams of his father leave him fatigued and vulnerable.

title: Professor Negi went behind my back?! I shall never condone such a thing!
overview: Ayaka is suspicious of the Chupacabra Club and jealous at being left out of the Magic Training Camp, so she uses espionage to infiltrate Negi's inner circle.

title: Huh, so the Baron is a kind of a rose. I thought it was a kind of potato.
overview: Takamechi uses a spy to keep tabs on Negi, and things take a dire turn when a heartbreaking betrayal lands Negi in danger of being turned into an animal.

title: After much quibbling, in the end all it comes down to is how you feel.
overview: Negi's secret is revealed to one of his students, but the thought of kissing him prompts her to run away! With the entire Chupa Army in hot pursuit, it's a race to find her before Motsu and Shichimi.

title: Rather than a question of you being the enemy, the issue is really whether or not  you are a nuisance to the Master.
overview: Having been caught performing magic by Motsu and Shichimi, Negi is stripped of his powers and turned into a chupacabra!

title: Frankly speaking, in the face of magic, scientific theory might as well be nonexistent.
overview: Negi and the cuties of Class 3-A are trapped in a world that looks familiar - but isn't. Before the final bell rings, the young wizard must regain his human form and rescue his students!

title: The class is growing disquiet at the unexpected turn of events. So they’re getting louder? 15 points.
overview: Negi and Nodoka activate their contract in hopes of returning to Mahora, but no matter how familiar their surroundings may be - things are not as they appear.

title: Yesterday's foe is today's friend. Good enough friends to have fights. No doesn't always mean no.
overview: A catfight erupts between Asuna and Ayaka! Meanwhile, Eva and Takahata search for a way out of the dream world, while Motsu and Shichimi cast their lot with a dark stranger!

title: Natsumi, family will always be the home run king of bonds. Don't you agree? I don't understand what you mean at all, Chizuru.
overview: A gorgeous new arrival is discovered lounging "au natural" in the locker room! This pretty face is the hot topic on everyone's minds - at least until the mysterious Boingy-Boingy attacks again.

title: There's a bastard who gets all happy with secrets, then reveals them, and it really pisses me off. Chiu-Chiu is going to get angry too! Really mad!
overview: The identity of the Black Rose Baron has been revealed, and it's none other than Negi's sister - Nekane! Questions abound and inquiring minds want to know what's behind her puzzling alter ego.

title: It's great to go back to being a kid again and having fun. Although, I can have fun without going back to being a kid, too.
overview: The magical version of Mahora just got a lot weirder! The 31 girls of Class 3-A have all transformed into dud mode! Negi's students don't need a teacher - they need a babysitter!

title: They say, bigger the blander, but that's not necessarily true in actuality.
overview: Eva, transformed into a giant, is trapped in a trance and determined to make it to class no matter what stands in her way. Once Eva arrives at school, she promptly takes a nap - on the roof!

title: A man silently eats his Ramen Takamichi. What the hell does that even mean?
overview: Yue has been experiencing some strange feelings for Negi, but she’s got good reason to keep them under wraps - her best friend, Nodoka, has a major thing for their teacher.

title: Aiya! Something strange is beginning to happen! This must surely be the end of the world!
overview: Chizuru explains her theories of what's behind the wave of demonic possession at Mahora, forcing Negi to make a painful realization - someone from his past is responsible for all the recent trouble!

title: Wait, you can't do that, Negi! That's right, because we're your partners!
overview: Anya stole the Star Crystal in an attempt to destroy everything Negi holds dear. Driven mad by loneliness, she uses her dark powers to possess Eva and wage war on the students of Mahora Academy.

title: Professor Negi, it appears this is the climax. Let's all go home together, Negi!
overview: Negi is trapped in the heart of the Star Crystal with Anya! The girls can only watch as their teacher is forced to handle this battle on his own.

title: And with that, the case is closed!
overview: Class 3-A keeps watch on Anya while preparing the school for a big party! Meanwhile, Negi decides to investigate the mysterious light that helped him avoid being trapped in the Star Crystal forever.

title: I will not say that I am lonely! Because, I have faith that we will surely meet again!
overview: Almost everything is back to normal, but something is keeping Negi from enjoying the spoils of victory. The young wizard still seeks answers about his father's role in this adventure.
